items.title: Amazon API Gateway
items.description: API Gateway for DVA-C02. REST API vs HTTP API vs WebSocket API, integration types, authorizers (Cognito, Lambda), deployment stages, caching, throttling, CORS, canary deployments, and usage plans.

items.title: AWS Serverless Application Model (SAM)
items.description: AWS SAM for DVA-C02. SAM template syntax, safe deployments (CodeDeploy), sam local testing, SAM CLI commands (build, deploy, sync), policy templates, and how SAM transforms to CloudFormation.

items.title: Microservices Design Patterns
items.description: Comprehensive guide to microservices design patterns including API Gateway, Circuit Breaker, Service Mesh, Sidecar, Strangler Fig, Bulkhead, and service discovery in Spring Cloud.
